versions.version_description: Christmas treat: real intermediate version with rhythm tab and counter-melody / suggestions for playable voicings / well-aligned and complete for convenient auto-scrolling / link to soundcloud demo of the arrangement.
This verision combines a fingerstyle tab for the chorus with chords for the whole song.
Extra chords and plays very well and i believe worthy of publishing to share with others who want to play this classic tune.
This is a Jazz version of this song.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
https://youtu.be/E8gmARGvPlI
